MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Judgment Entered

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Order that Matters in Request for Admission of Truth of Facts be Deemed Admitted is DENIED. The court denies the motion because the defendant states that she provided a response on July 15, 2025, and there is no contention that those responses do not substantially comply with the code. (CCP 2033.280(c) [deny motion where response provided before hearing]; Povtar Decl., par. 3.)

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must deliver it to Dept. 301.

Judge: Christopher C. Hite. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CCH)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
